Looking at the commit messages, they follow a pattern like "Verb phrase (#PR-number)" or "Verb phrase". The work done here is implementing the "discuss entity in new conversation" feature from issue #71.

content.text: Now I'll stage all changes and create a commit:

input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement "Discuss entity" feature to start conversations with entity context (#71)

Added ability for users to start a new chat conversation with a referenced entity from three UI surfaces: search results, entity detail panel, and governance feed. When a user clicks "Discuss" on any entity card, the entity ID is stored in view-state, the app navigates to chat, and the first message creation includes the entity reference in the database. The chat UI displays a DiscussEntityCard badge showing which entity is being discussed. Backend loads the discussed entity summary and includes it in the conversation response payload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Commit all changes with comprehensive message

content.text: Perfect! Now I'll create the PR on main:

input.command:
gh pr create --base main --title "Implement discuss entity feature to start conversations with entity context (#71)" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
Added ability for users to start a new chat conversation with a referenced entity from search results, entity detail panel, and governance feed. When clicking "Discuss" on any entity card, the entity ID is stored in view-state, the app navigates to chat, and includes the entity reference when creating the conversation. The chat UI displays a DiscussEntityCard badge showing which entity is being discussed.

## Changes
- **Frontend state management:** Added discussEntityId field and navigation helpers to view-state store
- **Chat session integration:** Modified chat hook to read discussEntityId from view-state and pass it to message creation
- **UI components:** Added "Discuss" buttons to EntityDetailPanel, SearchResultCard, and fixed broken implementation in GovernanceFeed
- **New component:** Created DiscussEntityCard to display referenced entity in chat
- **Backend context loading:** Implemented loading and returning discussed entity summary in conversation responses
- **Schema updates:** Added discusses field to conversation table, extended GraphEntityTable type to include observations

## Test plan
- [ ] Start a conversation by clicking "Discuss" from search results
- [ ] Verify entity badge appears at top of chat
- [ ] Verify entity is saved in database with discusses field
- [ ] Repeat from entity detail panel and governance feed
- [ ] Verify entity context is included in chat agent's system prompt

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

content.thinking: Excellent! The PR has been created successfully. Let me provide the user with the PR URL and a summary of what was done.

content.text:
✅ **PR created successfully!**

**PR Link:** https://github.com/marcus-sa/brain/pull/82

**Summary of changes:**
- Implemented the "discuss entity" feature allowing users to start conversations with entity context from search results, entity detail panels, and governance feed
- Added frontend state management (view-state store) to track discussed entities
- Integrated entity reference handling in the chat session hook
- Created DiscussEntityCard component to display referenced entities in chat
- Updated backend to load and return discussed entity information in conversation responses
- Extended schema to support discusses relationships on conversation records

The PR includes 19 files changed with 266 insertions across frontend components, backend chat infrastructure, and database schema.
